title: Learn anything with the /teach skill
description:
Learn how to use my /teach skill that creates personalized lessons, tracks progress, and adapts to each learner's zone of proximal development. Perfect for onboarding and independent learning.

10:04 Use cases for teach
11:06 Developers as AI first movers
